title: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027

title: Newcastle United vs Barcelona - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
description: Newcastle United have faced Barcelona five times before in Europe, each coming in the UEFA Champions League. The Magpies’ only victory came in the first clash, 3-2 at home in the Group Stages in September 1997, with Barca winning each of the following four games. Barcelona have faced English opposition 33 times in the knockout stages of the UEFA Champions League, winning 10 of their last 12 matches since 2014.

title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg

This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich and Juventus have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this seasons league phase.

description: Celta Vigo won none of their first four major European matches against French sides but they’ve won both this season, beating Nice and Lille – on both occasions 2-1 – in the group stage. This is Lyon’s 34th meeting with Spanish clubs in major European competitions but their first ever with Celta Vigo. They’ve already lost to Spanish opposition in the UEFA Europa League this season, a 2-0 defeat to Real Betis in the group stage.

title: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
description: Manchester City will face Real Madrid for the 16th time in the UEFA Champions League, twice as often as they have faced any other team in the competition. This will be the first time two teams have met in the knockout phase of the competition in five consecutive seasons. Only Bayern Munich and Juventus have won more UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid than Manchester City, who beat them 2-1 in this seasons league phase.

title: Bodø / Glimt vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
description: This will be the first ever knockout stage tie between teams from Norway and Portugal in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, and the first in any major European competition since the last 32 of the 2003-04 UEFA Cup. Bodø/Glimt have won both of their previous two games against Portuguese sides in European competition, with both of those coming in last season’s UEFA Europa League.

title: Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg
description: Bayer Leverkusen have progressed from four of their five major European knockout ties against English clubs, failing only against Liverpool in 2004-05 in the UEFA Champions League. title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Chelsea - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 1st leg

The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.
